calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Dec-14-2011 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stella Kang for and with Sarah Bina (Petitioner). Michael Williams (Respondent).

Petitioner and Respondent were sworn prior to the commencement of the hearing.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Court denied the Request for a Protective Order with prejudice for Mrs. Bina to seek relief under a different statute. The Court does not feel that Mrs. Bina qualified under the Elder or Dependent Adult Abuse Statute.

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Rose M. Miller CSR #5041. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque.
